title: Networks, Queues, Simulation, and Operations Research
description: Build, test, and communicate a model involving routing, queues, and allocation. Learners cumulatively produce a reproducible operations research computational study through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Formulate network flow in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Derive integer programming in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Compute queueing models in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
